We are glad that you are returning home after recovering from illness. We hope that you are
satisfied with the free health services provided under Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan
Arogya Yojana.
HT
HSE TEHGH
We request you to share your experience in the form enclosed with this letter. Your feedback
will help us to improve the services being offered under the scheme.
3
We also request you to share your experience with others and encourage them to get
their Ayushman cards by visiting CSC or empanelled hospital.
4R
We wish you and your family a happy & healthy life head.

lines.text: We are glad that you are returning home after recovering from illness. We hope that you are
satisfied with the free health services provided under Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan
We request you to share your experience in the form enclosed with this letter. Your feedback
will help us to improve the services being offered under the scheme.
We also request you to share your experience with others and encourage them to get
their Ayushman cards by visiting CSC or empanelled hospital.
